---
title: "통계 챗봇"
subtitle: "AI 기반 통계학 질문 답변 시스템"
format: html
---

<style>
  .chatbot-container {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .api-key-section {
    background-color: #f8f9fa;
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  }

  .api-key-input-group {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .api-key-input {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ced4da;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: monospace;
  }

  .btn {
    padding: 10px 20px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background-color: #0d6efd;
    color: white;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover {
    background-color: #0b5ed7;
  }

  .btn-primary:disabled {
    background-color: #6c757d;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  .btn-danger {
    background-color: #dc3545;
    color: white;
  }

  .btn-danger:hover {
    background-color: #bb2d3b;
  }

  .status-message {
    padding: 10px 15px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    display: none;
  }

  .status-message.success {
    background-color: #d4edda;
    color: #155724;
    border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
    display: block;
  }

  .status-message.error {
    background-color: #f8d7da;
    color: #721c24;
    border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
    display: block;
  }

  .chat-interface {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 15px;
  }

  .chat-interface.active {
    display: flex;
  }

  .chat-messages {
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    border-radius: 8px;
    height: 500px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 15px;
    background-color: #ffffff;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .message {
    display: flex;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    animation: slideIn 0.3s ease-in-out;
  }

  @keyframes slideIn {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(10px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  }

  .message.user {
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }

  .message.assistant {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .message-content {
    max-width: 70%;
    padding: 12px 15px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    word-wrap: break-word;
  }

  .message.user .message-content {
    background-color: #0d6efd;
    color: white;
  }

  .message.assistant .message-content {
    background-color: #e9ecef;
    color: #212529;
  }

  .input-area {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .chat-input {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 12px 15px;
    border: 1px solid #ced4da;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: inherit;
  }

  .chat-input:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #0d6efd;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25);
  }

  .info-box {
    background-color: #e7f3ff;
    border-left: 4px solid #0d6efd;
    padding: 15px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
  }

  .info-box h4 {
    margin: 0 0 10px 0;
    color: #0d6efd;
  }

  .info-box ul {
    margin: 0;
    padding-left: 20px;
  }

  .info-box li {
    margin: 5px 0;
    color: #495057;
  }

  .loading {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background-color: #0d6efd;
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: blink 1.4s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes blink {
    0%, 20%, 50%, 80%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    40% { opacity: 0.3; }
    60% { opacity: 0.5; }
  }
</style>

<div class="chatbot-container">
  <!-- API Key Section -->
  <div class="api-key-section">
    <h3>🔑 OpenAI API 키 입력</h3>
    <p style="color: #6c757d; margin-bottom: 15px;">
      OpenAI API 키를 입력하세요. 키는 로컬에만 저장되며 서버에 전송되지 않습니다.
    </p>
    
    <div class="api-key-input-group">
      <input 
        type="password" 
        id="apiKeyInput" 
        class="api-key-input" 
        placeholder="sk-..."
        autocomplete="off"
      />
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="saveKeyBtn">저장</button>
      <button class="btn btn-danger" id="clearKeyBtn" style="display: none;">초기화</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="status-message" id="statusMessage"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Info Box -->
  <div class="info-box" id="infoBox">
    <h4>📝 사용 안내</h4>
    <ul>
      <li>OpenAI API 키를 먼저 입력해주세요</li>
      <li>API 키는 브라우저 로컬 스토리지에만 저장됩니다</li>
      <li>통계학 관련 질문을 자유롭게 입력할 수 있습니다</li>
      <li>각 질문당 약 $0.0005의 비용이 발생합니다</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <!-- Chat Interface -->
  <div class="chat-interface" id="chatInterface">
    <div class="chat-messages" id="chatMessages"></div>
    <div class="input-area">
      <input 
        type="text" 
        id="chatInput" 
        class="chat-input" 
        placeholder="통계학 질문을 입력하세요..."
        autocomplete="off"
      />
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="sendBtn">전송</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  // Constants
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'openai_api_key';
  const OPENAI_API_URL = 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions';

  // DOM Elements
  const apiKeyInput = document.getElementById('apiKeyInput');
  const saveKeyBtn = document.getElementById('saveKeyBtn');
  const clearKeyBtn = document.getElementById('clearKeyBtn');
  const statusMessage = document.getElementById('statusMessage');
  const chatInterface = document.getElementById('chatInterface');
  const chatMessages = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
  const chatInput = document.getElementById('chatInput');
  const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
  const infoBox = document.getElementById('infoBox');

  // Initialize
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const savedKey = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (savedKey) {
      apiKeyInput.value = savedKey;
      apiKeyInput.type = 'password';
      saveKeyBtn.textContent = '업데이트';
      clearKeyBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
      chatInterface.classList.add('active');
      infoBox.style.display = 'none';
    }

    // Event Listeners
    saveKeyBtn.addEventListener('click', saveApiKey);
    clearKeyBtn.addEventListener('click', clearApiKey);
    sendBtn.addEventListener('click', sendMessage);
    chatInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
        e.preventDefault();
        sendMessage();
      }
    });
  });

  function showStatus(message, type) {
    statusMessage.textContent = message;
    statusMessage.className = `status-message ${type}`;
    if (type === 'success') {
      setTimeout(() => {
        statusMessage.className = 'status-message';
      }, 3000);
    }
  }

  function saveApiKey() {
    const key = apiKeyInput.value.trim();
    if (!key) {
      showStatus('❌ API 키를 입력해주세요', 'error');
      return;
    }
    if (!key.startsWith('sk-')) {
      showStatus('❌ 올바른 OpenAI API 키 형식이 아닙니다', 'error');
      return;
    }
    
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, key);
    apiKeyInput.type = 'password';
    saveKeyBtn.textContent = '업데이트';
    clearKeyBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
    chatInterface.classList.add('active');
    infoBox.style.display = 'none';
    showStatus('✅ API 키가 저장되었습니다', 'success');
  }

  function clearApiKey() {
    localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    apiKeyInput.value = '';
    apiKeyInput.type = 'text';
    saveKeyBtn.textContent = '저장';
    clearKeyBtn.style.display = 'none';
    chatInterface.classList.remove('active');
    chatMessages.innerHTML = '';
    infoBox.style.display = 'block';
    showStatus('✅ API 키가 초기화되었습니다', 'success');
  }

  async function sendMessage() {
    const message = chatInput.value.trim();
    if (!message) return;

    const apiKey = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!apiKey) {
      showStatus('❌ API 키를 입력해주세요', 'error');
      return;
    }

    // Add user message to chat
    addMessage('user', message);
    chatInput.value = '';
    sendBtn.disabled = true;
    chatInput.disabled = true;

    // Add loading indicator
    const loadingMsg = addMessage('assistant', '생각 중입니다...');

    try {
      const response = await fetch(OPENAI_API_URL, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: 'gpt-3.5-turbo',
          messages: [
            {
              role: 'system',
              content: '당신은 통계학 교수입니다. 질문에 정확하고 이해하기 쉬운 방식으로 답변해주세요.'
            },
            {
              role: 'user',
              content: message
            }
          ],
          temperature: 0.7,
          max_tokens: 1000
        })
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        const error = await response.json();
        throw new Error(error.error?.message || 'API 요청 실패');
      }

      const data = await response.json();
      const assistantMessage = data.choices[0].message.content;

      // Replace loading message with actual response
      loadingMsg.innerHTML = `<div class="message-content">${escapeHtml(assistantMessage)}</div>`;

    } catch (error) {
      loadingMsg.innerHTML = `<div class="message-content" style="color: #dc3545;">❌ 오류: ${escapeHtml(error.message)}</div>`;
    } finally {
      sendBtn.disabled = false;
      chatInput.disabled = false;
      chatInput.focus();
    }
  }

  function addMessage(role, content) {
    const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');
    messageDiv.className = `message ${role}`;
    messageDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="message-content">${escapeHtml(content)}</div>`;
    chatMessages.appendChild(messageDiv);
    chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
    return messageDiv;
  }

  function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
  }
</script>
